name: Patient 18
history: Academic underperformance despite intelligence. Dropped out of college X due to isolation. Two years of credits remain. Mother had high expectations. Financial difficulties.
intermediate_belief: Dropping out proves I'm a failure who can't finish anything.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll never meet expectations; I'm permanently behind.
situation: Seeking financial help from parents after family conversation about dropout.
auto_thought: "They're giving me money out of pity. They think I'm a lost cause."
behavior: Mumbles request, avoids eye contact, promises to 'do better' without concrete plan.
